## LibraryRuntime.MaterializedLibrary class

A read-only library providing lazily-materialized, cached runtime objects. Wraps a data-layer library and converts entities to materialized objects on demand.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class MaterializedLibrary<TId extends string, TEntity, TMaterialized, TQuerySpec = never> extends Collections.ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap<TId, TEntity, TMaterialized> 
```
**Extends:** Collections.ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap&lt;TId, TEntity, TMaterialized&gt;
